nasb.text: Whenever the living beings moved, the wheels moved with them. And whenever the living beings rose from the earth, the wheels rose also.

esv.text: And when the living creatures went, the wheels went beside them; and when the living creatures rose from the earth, the wheels rose.

cnv.text: 活物走動的時候，牠們旁邊的輪子也隨著移動。活物從地上升起的時候，輪子也隨著升起。

ccb.text: 活物行走，轮子也在旁边行走；活物上升，轮子也上升。
